allow: Bash(echo "=== my-agent ===" && ls -la "C:/Users/User/.claude/my-agent" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== projects/Lesson Forge ===" && ls -la "C:/Users/User/.claude/projects/Lesson Forge" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== agents dir ===" && ls -la "C:/Users/User/.claude/agents" 2>/dev/null)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"\); $exe = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($exe\) { Start-Process $exe; "Launching: $exe" } else { "Docker Desktop.exe not found in standard locations" })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process "Docker Desktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Docker Desktop process running \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)" } else { "Docker Desktop process NOT running" }; "---WSL distros---"; wsl -l -v)

PowerShell(Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $p = Get-Process "Docker Desktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Docker Desktop running \(PID $\($p.Id\)\) after 20s" } else { "Docker Desktop exited again" })

PowerShell("=== Virtualization ==="; $ci = Get-ComputerInfo -Property HyperVRequirementVirtualizationFirmwareEnabled,HyperVisorPresent -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $ci | Format-List; "=== Docker Desktop log \(last 25 lines\) ==="; $log = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\log.txt"; if \(Test-Path $log\) { Get-Content $log -Tail 25 } else { "no log.txt at $log" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('solution',{}\); print\('status:', d.get\('status'\)\); print\('message:', d.get\('message'\)\); print\('httpStatus:', s.get\('status'\)\); print\('url:', s.get\('url'\)\); print\('html_len:', len\(s.get\('response',''\)\)\)")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8191 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Stopping PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { "Nothing listening on 8191" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8191 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) {"still bound"} else {"port 8191 free"})
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/cat.json'\)\); m=d.get\('metas',[]\); print\('meta count:', len\(m\)\); [print\(' -', x.get\('name'\), '|', x.get\('id'\)\) for x in m[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('metas',[]\); print\('meta count:', len\(m\)\); [print\(' -', x.get\('name'\),'|',x.get\('id'\)\) for x in m[:6]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d.get\('metas',[]\); print\('meta count:', len\(m\)\); [print\(' -', x.get\('name'\)\) for x in m[:4]]")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "Docker Desktop","com.docker.backend","com.docker.build","com.docker.dev-envs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\run" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(cmd /c "del /f /q `"$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\run\\dockerInference`" `"$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\run\\userAnalyticsOtlpHttp.sock`"" ; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\run" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object Count; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; "restarted")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "Docker Desktop","com.docker.backend" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Rename-Item "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\run" "run_stale_$\(Get-Random\)" -ErrorAction Stop; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; "run dir renamed, Docker restarted")
